A photorealistic three-panel vertical collage featuring a stylish young couple in a cozy, dimly lit bedroom setting. In the top panel, the couple poses for a playful selfie; the girl, wearing a pink tank top, pokes her cheek with her finger while making a cute pout, and the boy, in a black hoodie, smiles warmly next to her. In the middle panel, the girl looks softly at the camera with a digital filter crown of floating pink hearts above her head, while the boy looks at her affectionately from the side. In the bottom panel, an intimate close-up shows the girl touching her lip with her fingers, and the boy leaning in close behind her, looking into the lens. The lighting is warm and soft, capturing a romantic, candid, and authentic Gen Z social media aesthetic. 100% my face same I need this prompt picture,

“A young man sitting casually in a modern café lounge, captured in a natural candid angle. He is wearing a crisp white button-down shirt and light blue denim jeans, with one arm resting on the side of the chair and the other hand touching his face thoughtfully. Soft, warm café lighting from large round ceiling lamps illuminates his face and highlights the texture of his shirt. His hairstyle is voluminous, neat, and stylish. Background includes a modern coffee shop interior with wooden shelves jars coffee machines and blurred people standing and talking creating a relaxed ambience. The colour palette is warm and vibrant with subtle depth of field, smooth bokeh, and high-resolution details. don't unfollow after getting the prompt don't be like the rest of them be the loyal ones🫶🏻

No changes to facial structure. No beautification or stylization.
Create an ultra-realistic live-action cinematic AMV. Man wears a black blazer, white shirt slightly open, loosened black tie, gripping the tie near the collar in a controlled, threatening manner. Posture relaxed yet dominant; body angled, head lowered. Expression calm, cold, emotionless, faint restrained smirk.
Only one eye emits energy: a thin white-blue streak leaking sideways, compressed and restrained—no glow or halo. Other eye stays dark. Black shadow tendrils flow from the emitting eye like ink in water, breaking into mist, carried by wind and rain, filling the background.
High-contrast lighting, one side of face in shadow, slow-motion rain, cold grading, deep blacks, shallow depth of field, cinematic framing, realistic physics, aura of quiet menace and absolute control.

Use the uploaded selfie/selfies as the ONLY identity reference. Natural, casual, unposed expression.Framing:Centered subjects.Hands forming the heart clearly visible. No dramatic or cinematic skyLighting:Natural daylight.Slight uneven lighting like a real phone photo. No studio light.No glow.Style & Texture: Raw phone-camera realism. No filters.Lock Screen UI:iPhone-style lock screen layout.Large centered time and date visible at the top.Wallpaper-style composition, not edited text.

A high-contrast cinematic triptych consisting of three vertical rectangular frames stacked vertically in a single image. The subject is a stylish young man with voluminous, textured dark hair, wearing a crisp white button-down shirt with sleeves rolled up to the elbows, dark sunglasses, and a silver wristwatch. The entire composition is in moody black and white photography. The background is a vast, sunrise with beautiful moming. Top frame: side profile, he is adjusting his sunglasses. Middle frame: three-quarter view, he is looking away from the camera with a confident stance. Bottom frame: looking down and away, capturing a candid, dynamic movement. Sharp details, editorial fashion aesthetic, 8k resolution, film grain.
